name: Ripe & Ready Avocados (Pack of 4)
description: Hand-selected Hass avocados delivered at peak ripeness — creamy, buttery flesh with a rich, nutty flavour. Great for guacamole, toast, salads, or eating straight from the skin with a sprinkle of salt.

specifications.value: 1–2 days at room temperature; 3–5 days refrigerated once ripe
Refrigerate once ripe to slow further ripening

additionalInfo.value: Guacamole, avocado toast, salads, sushi, smoothies
Recyclable cardboard tray with net wrap

reviews.title: Finally, avocados that are actually ripe!
reviews.reviewText: I've ordered avocados online before and they're usually rock hard. These were perfectly ripe the day they arrived. Made guacamole immediately and it was phenomenal.

reviews.title: Consistent quality every order
reviews.reviewText: I order these every two weeks. They're always creamy, perfectly ripe, and have that deep Hass flavour. The 4-pack is the perfect size for my household.

reviews.title: Great avocados, one was overripe
reviews.reviewText: Three of the four were perfect. The fourth was a little too soft and had started to brown inside, but the others were absolutely delicious. Good value overall.

reviews.title: Best avocado toast I've ever made
reviews.reviewText: Spent a weekend making fancy brunches with these and my friends were genuinely impressed. Rich, creamy, no strings or brown spots. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Perfect for meal prep
reviews.reviewText: These hit the sweet spot of ripeness right on delivery day. I use two immediately and refrigerate the other two. Works out perfectly for the week. Great product!
